description: Read-only planning artifact derived from planning-vs-captured Browser Evidence coverage for the Employer Brand comparative audit fixture.
evidence_still_needed_summary: The captured local fixture covers only the careers_site request for Symphony Talent, Phenom, and Radancy. Each company still needs planned non-careers evidence for employer brand pages, LinkedIn presence, review platforms, social or campaign examples, awards or recognition, and employee stories. Review platforms are required policy coverage; the other gaps remain attempt-if-available or optional planning coverage.

by_company.evidence_still_needed: Capture Symphony Talent evidence beyond the careers-site fixture: EVP/culture/values or benefits pages, LinkedIn talent presence, review-platform sentiment, campaign examples, employer recognition, and employee stories.

Capture Phenom evidence beyond the careers-site fixture: EVP/culture/values or benefits pages, LinkedIn talent presence, review-platform sentiment, campaign examples, employer recognition, and employee stories.

Capture Radancy evidence beyond the careers-site fixture: EVP/culture/values or benefits pages, LinkedIn talent presence, review-platform sentiment, campaign examples, employer recognition, and employee stories.
